summary: Ad break failures at stream start logged in DataDog
description:
GIVEN a tester has access to DataDog
AND is viewing Playback Heuristics in DataDog
AND a user is logged in with dm5tv3@gmail.com / PasswordDM5
AND the tester has blocked calls to {{dai.googl.com}} via Chrome Dev Tools
AND has initiated playback of a Live ads enabled stream

*NOTE:*
This test will need to be performed on a Chrome browser.
URL for Playback Heuristics: [https://us5.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%22PLAYBACK%20HEURISTICS%22%20%40usr.id%3A00u24vtyge3Pzk2rY0h8&agg_m=%40event.metadata.currentBitrate&agg_m_source=base&agg_q=%40asset.isLive&agg_q_source=base&agg_t=avg&analyticsOptions=%5B%22line%22%2C%22dog_classic%22%2Cnull%2Cnull%5D&cols=host%2Cservice%2C%40usr.id%2C%40event.action%2C%40event.reason%2C%40event.metadata.convivaTimestamp&context_event=AY_CgMDtAAD8tvFqYXPtGgAB&fromUser=true&messageDisplay=inline&refresh_mode=sliding&storage=hot&stream_sort=%40convivaTimestamp%2Casc&top_n=10&top_o=top&view=spans&viz=&x_missing=true&from_ts=1726669870274&to_ts=1726684270274&live=true|https://us5.datadoghq.com/logs?query=%22PLAYBACK%20HEURISTICS%22%20%40usr.id%3A00u24vtyge3Pzk2rY0h8&agg_m=%40event.metadata.currentBitrate&agg_m_source=base&agg_q=%40asset.isLive&agg_q_source=base&agg_t=avg&analyticsOptions=%5B%22line%22%2C%22dog_classic%22%2Cnull%2Cnull%5D&cols=host%2Cservice%2C%40usr.id%2C%40event.action%2C%40event.reason%2C%40event.metadata.convivaTimestamp&context_event=AY_CgMDtAAD8tvFqYXPtGgAB&fromUser=true&messageDisplay=inline&refresh_mode=sliding&storage=hot&stream_sort=%40convivaTimestamp%2Casc&top_n=10&top_o=top&view=spans&viz=&x_missing=true&from_ts=1726669870274&to_ts=1726684270274&live=true]

The tester may need to update the User ID in DataDog to the Okta ID of the test user from the test environment.

steps.action: WHEN a failed call to DAI occurs
